name: Yogi Adityanath
text: Yogi Adityanath: Chief Minister of Uttar Pradesh since 2017 (re-elected 2022). BJP. MP from Gorakhpur for 5 terms. Focus: Law and order, expressway development, investment summits, and industrial development in UP.

name: Mamata Banerjee
text: Mamata Banerjee: Chief Minister of West Bengal since 2011 (3rd term). All India Trinamool Congress founder. Focus: Kanyashree scheme, social welfare, Duare Sarkar (doorstep government services).

name: M.K. Stalin
text: M.K. Stalin: Chief Minister of Tamil Nadu since 2021. DMK President. Son of M. Karunanidhi. Focus: Dravidian model of governance, social justice, breakfast scheme for schoolchildren, Tamil pride.

name: Pinarayi Vijayan
text: Pinarayi Vijayan: Chief Minister of Kerala since 2016 (re-elected 2021). CPI(M). Focus: Kerala development model, K-FON internet project, healthcare and education. Led COVID response in Kerala.

name: Siddaramaiah
text: Siddaramaiah: Chief Minister of Karnataka since 2023 (2nd term, first 2013-2018). INC. Introduced five guarantee schemes: Shakti, Gruha Jyothi, Gruha Lakshmi, Anna Bhagya, Yuva Nidhi.

name: Revanth Reddy
text: Revanth Reddy: Chief Minister of Telangana since December 2023. INC. Former MP from Malkajgiri. Ended BRS rule in Telangana. Focus: Six guarantees including farm loan waiver, free bus travel for women.

name: Bhagwant Mann
text: Bhagwant Mann: Chief Minister of Punjab since 2022. Aam Aadmi Party. Former comedian. Focus: Anti-corruption, free electricity, education reform, doorstep delivery of government services.

name: Himanta Biswa Sarma
text: Himanta Biswa Sarma: Chief Minister of Assam since 2021. BJP. Former Congress leader. Focus: Act East Policy implementation, flood management, NRC, and anti-drug campaigns in Northeast India.

name: Nitish Kumar
text: Nitish Kumar: Chief Minister of Bihar since 2024 (9th term total). JDU. Known for prohibition policy, women empowerment schemes, and infrastructure development. One of India's longest-serving CMs.

name: Naveen Patnaik
text: Naveen Patnaik: Chief Minister of Odisha for 24 years (2000-2024, 5 terms). BJD founder. Longest-serving CM of Odisha. Known for disaster management and KALIA scheme for farmers. Lost 2024 elections.

name: Mohan Yadav
text: Mohan Yadav: Chief Minister of Madhya Pradesh since December 2023. BJP. OBC leader. Succeeded Shivraj Singh Chouhan. Focus: Ladli Behna Yojana continuation and industrial development.

name: Bhajan Lal Sharma
text: Bhajan Lal Sharma: Chief Minister of Rajasthan since December 2023. BJP. First-time CM. Focus: Water conservation, tourism development, and continuation of welfare schemes in Rajasthan.

name: Eknath Shinde
text: Eknath Shinde: Chief Minister of Maharashtra since June 2022. Shiv Sena (Shinde faction). Led rebellion against Uddhav Thackeray. Alliance with BJP and NCP (Ajit Pawar faction) in Mahayuti coalition.

name: N. Chandrababu Naidu
text: N. Chandrababu Naidu: Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh since June 2024 (4th term). TDP founder. Known as architect of Hyderabad IT hub. Focus: Amaravati capital development, industrial growth.

name: Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu
text: Sukhvinder Singh Sukhu: Chief Minister of Himachal Pradesh since December 2022. INC. Focus: Old Pension Scheme restoration, Start-up policy, and apple farming support.

name: Pushkar Singh Dhami
text: Pushkar Singh Dhami: Chief Minister of Uttarakhand since 2021 (re-elected 2022). BJP. Youngest CM of Uttarakhand. Focus: Uniform Civil Code implementation, anti-conversion law, hill state development.

name: Pramod Sawant
text: Pramod Sawant: Chief Minister of Goa since 2019 (re-elected 2022). BJP. Former Speaker of Goa Assembly. Focus: Tourism revival, IT infrastructure, and mining policy reform.

name: Conrad Sangma
text: Conrad Sangma: Chief Minister of Meghalaya since 2018 (re-elected 2023). National People's Party. Focus: Infrastructure development, healthcare, education in Northeast India.

name: Hemant Soren
text: Hemant Soren: Chief Minister of Jharkhand since July 2024 (3rd term). JMM. Focus: Tribal rights, mining regulation, forest land rights, Abua Awas Yojana.

name: Arvind Kejriwal
text: Arvind Kejriwal: Former Chief Minister of Delhi (2013 briefly, then 2015-2024). AAP National Convener. Focus: Mohalla Clinics, government school transformation, free water and electricity, doorstep delivery.
